da.page_subtitle: Administrer kurser, blog, brugere og indhold
da.not_logged_in_text: Du skal logge ind for at få adgang til administrationen.
da.title: Titel
da.confirm_delete_course: Slet kursus? Alle moduler og kapitler slettes også.
da.confirm_delete_module: Slet modul? Alle kapitler slettes også.
da.bulk_paste: Indsæt dit indhold her (fra PDF eller tekst)
da.bulk_empty: Indsæt tekst ovenfor og klik Forhåndsvis.
da.users_suspend_confirm: Suspendér denne bruger? De vil miste adgang til alt gated indhold.
da.users_unsuspend_confirm: Genaktivér denne bruger? De vil genvinde adgang baseret på deres rolle.
da.users_bulk_role_prompt: Indtast ny rolle (member, trainee, student, teacher, admin):
da.campaign_compose_sms_tip: Hold dig under 160 tegn for bedste levering.
da.campaign_compose_email_attachment_drop: Træk fil hertil eller klik for at vælge
da.campaign_send_warning: Du er ved at sende til {count} modtagere.
da.apps_acceptance_confirm: Send godkendelses-e-mail til denne ansøger? Hvis de ikke har en konto, bliver der oprettet en.
da.apps_bulk_status_prompt: Vælg ny status for valgte ansøgninger:
da.doc_field_url_hint: Fuld URL til PDF på Cloudinary
da.catalog_seed_confirm: Udfyld kursuskatalog med CSV-data? Dette tilføjer ~55 elementer til Firestore. Fortsæt?
da.catalog_already_seeded: Kataloget har allerede data — seed sprunget over.
da.catalog_bulk_delete_confirm: Slet {count} katalog-elementer? Dette kan ikke fortrydes.
da.appt_delete_confirm: Er du sikker på du vil slette denne aftale?
da.appt_cancel_confirm: Er du sikker på du vil aflyse denne aftale?
da.billing_preview_empty: Udfyld beløb og antal rater for at se forhåndsvisning.
da.billing_confirm_book: Bogfør denne faktura? Dette kan ikke fortrydes.
da.billing_error_no_customer: Vælg eller opret en kunde først.
da.billing_applicant_search_ph: Søg navn eller email blandt ansøgere...
da.billing_applicant_selected: Ansøger valgt — opret som e-conomic kunde for at fakturere
da.billing_notes_bank_ref_text: Venligst skriv dit fulde navn og fakturanummer i referencefeltet ved bankoverførsel, så vi kan matche din betaling.

en.page_subtitle: Manage courses, blog, users, and content
en.not_logged_in_text: You need to sign in to access the administration panel.
en.title: Title
en.confirm_delete_course: Delete course? All modules and chapters will also be deleted.
en.confirm_delete_module: Delete module? All chapters will also be deleted.
en.bulk_paste: Paste your content here (from PDF or text)
en.bulk_empty: Paste text above and click Preview.
en.users_suspend_confirm: Suspend this user? They will lose access to all gated content.
en.users_unsuspend_confirm: Reactivate this user? They will regain access based on their role.
en.users_no_phone: No selected users have phone numbers.
en.users_no_email_addr: No selected users have email addresses.
en.users_bulk_role_prompt: Enter new role (member, trainee, student, teacher, admin):
en.leads_no_phone: No selected leads have a phone number.
en.leads_no_email_addr: No selected leads have an email.
en.leads_email_hint: Signature and unsubscribe link are added automatically.
en.campaign_compose_sms_tip: Keep under 160 characters for best delivery.
en.campaign_compose_email_attachment_drop: Drag file here or click to select
en.campaign_send_warning: You are about to send to {count} recipients.
en.apps_acceptance_confirm: Send acceptance email to this applicant? If they don't have an account, one will be created.
en.apps_bulk_status_prompt: Choose new status for selected applications:
en.doc_field_url_hint: Full URL to PDF on Cloudinary
en.catalog_seed_confirm: Populate course catalog with CSV data? This will add ~55 items to Firestore. Continue?
en.catalog_already_seeded: Catalog already has data — seed skipped.
en.catalog_bulk_delete_confirm: Delete {count} catalog items? This cannot be undone.
en.appt_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this appointment?
en.appt_cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this appointment?
en.billing_inv_description_ph: E.g. Yoga Teacher Training 200h — Spring 2026 Cohort
en.billing_inv_notes_ph: Displayed at the bottom of the invoice...
en.billing_preview_empty: Enter amount and instalments to see a preview.
en.billing_confirm_book: Book this invoice? This cannot be undone.
en.billing_error_no_customer: Select or create a customer first.
en.billing_applicant_search_ph: Search name or email among applicants...
en.billing_applicant_selected: Applicant selected — create as e-conomic customer to invoice
en.billing_notes_bank_ref_text: Please write your full name and invoice number in the reference field when making a bank transfer, so we can match your payment.
